name: Una ad Astra
short_description: Una ad Astra is a turn-based tactical fantasy RPG, where you get to play not one, but two heroes. Mix and match skills from 7 different classes to defeat sneaky goblins and mighty dragons.
detailed_description:
Una ad Astra is a turn-based tactical fantasy RPG. It gives you control of two heroes, bridging the gap between limited options with just one character, and the slog of having to manage a full party of 4 or more heroes.

It is a simple open world adventure game with a focus on the tactical combat. Most of the time in this game is spent defeating monsters, upgrading your equipment, and levelling up your characters. The flexible class system allows you to mix and match skills from different classes, giving you a sandbox to build your characters however you like best. Features 10-20 hours of gameplay.
